title: stelis tenuissima
intro: Stelis tenuissima, a species of orchid, is a flowering plant native to Central and South America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Stelis tenuissima include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
